results.label: Hangang National University - Emily Johnson
results.summary: The Certificate of Admission is structurally sound, contains all required fields, has logical date ranges, features professional formatting, and lacks any fraud indicators or watermark overlays.

documentStructure.note: The document contains a clear letterhead, organized body sections, a formal signature block, and official institutional contact details.

programPeriodValidity.note: The program duration (September 1, 2024 to June 30, 2025) has a start date that logically precedes the end date.

dateConsistency.note: All dates (issue date 2024-05-15, orientation August 28, 2024, and program dates) are logically sequential and valid.

documentFormatting.note: The document features a highly professional, well-aligned, and visually consistent layout with appropriate typography and iconography.

officialSealSignature.note: Both a signature for 'Dr. Kim Joon-ho' and an official university seal ('Hangang National University') are present.

requiredFields.note: All mandatory details are present: Student Name, Student ID, Program/Department, Dates, and contact email (international@hnu.ac.kr).

noFraudIndicators.note: No signs of fraud detected. Formatting, spelling, email TLD (.ac.kr), and credentials are all professional and realistic.

results.label: Donggang International University - Lucas Müller
results.summary: The document is a valid and professionally structured Exchange Student Official Letter of Acceptance with all required fields, valid dates, and official authorization markings.

documentStructure.note: The document adheres to a standard official letter format, complete with a letterhead, structured details table, coherent body text, and a signature/seal block.

programPeriodValidity.note: The program period (March 2, 2025 to December 19, 2025) is logical and chronological.

dateConsistency.note: The issue date (2024-09-20) is properly formatted and logically precedes the program's starting date in 2025.

documentFormatting.note: The layout is highly professional, featuring consistent alignment, clean table borders, matching font families, and appropriate spacing.

officialSealSignature.note: The document features a clear signature from Prof. Park Soo-yeon and an official blue institutional seal of Donggang International University.

requiredFields.note: All necessary information, including the student's name, ID, home university, program department, duration, and contact details, is clearly present.

noFraudIndicators.note: No spelling errors, illogical dates, unprofessional language, or other common indicators of fraud were detected.

results.label: Admission Letter - James Kim (Suspicious)
results.summary: The document is invalid due to a highly visible 'SAMPLE DOCUMENT' watermark, severe date anomalies, reversed program timeline, joke credentials, and unrealistic scholarship figures.

documentStructure.note: While the overall layout resembles a letter, it contains highly unprofessional phrasing ('maybe in spam folder', 'No need to contact office') that violates official letter standards.

programPeriodValidity.note: The program end date (2022-12-31) is set before the program start date (2023-01-01).

dateConsistency.note: The issue date '2026-15-45' uses an impossible month (15), an impossible day (45), and is set in the future.

documentFormatting.note: The document contains glaring spelling mistakes ('aprooved', 'Congratlation!') and features a highly unprofessional verification stamp ('CERTIFIED AUTHENTIC REAL UNIVERSITY').

officialSealSignature.note: A signature and seal are present, though the seal design and text are satirical.

requiredFields.note: Student details, program dates, and contact information are physically present on the document.

noFraudIndicators.note: Multiple major fraud indicators detected: impossible dates (month 15, day 45), reversed program period, absurd scholarship amount (999,999,999 KRW), joke degree credentials ('Ph,D,D,D,D,MBA'), and a fake top-level domain email ('info@kieuniv.fake').

noWatermark.note: Large diagonal watermark 'SAMPLE DOCUMENT' is displayed across the entire letter body.

issues: A prominent watermark reading 'SAMPLE DOCUMENT' is present.
Program end date (2022-12-31) precedes start date (2023-01-01).
Unrealistically high scholarship amount of 999,999,999 KRW.
Joke credentials listed for the signatory: 'Ph,D,D,D,D,MBA'.
Fake email address with a '.fake' top-level domain.
Highly unprofessional language: '(maybe in spam folder)' and 'No need to contact office'.
Spelling errors in core message: 'aprooved' and 'Congratlation!'.
